CUS-5019.message: Dear Leo Ford, we’re sorry to let you know that your order ORD-90001 for ELC-1003, originally promised for 2026-07-07, may be delayed due to a temporary stock shortage. We are actively expediting replenishment and working to fulfill your order as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.
